name: 11-invalid-core-looking-id
description: Capability id `fs:chmod` has a single-label namespace (`fs:`) that matches the core-looking grammar but is not in the v0.1 core registry. Schema rejects at validation per ADR-0005.
notes: This is the silent-core-expansion prevention test. The `fs:` namespace is reserved for schema-registered core ids; emitters that need chmod-like semantics today must use a reverse-DNS extension namespace (e.g., `com.emitter.project:chmod`) until chmod is formally added to the core registry in a future schema version.
